description_long: This is a compact quadcopter drone with a sleek, matte black body and four extended arms, each supporting a single rotor with two blades. The central fuselage is rectangular with rounded edges, featuring a visible battery compartment and what appears to be a small camera or sensor mounted at the front. The arms are thin and angular, giving the drone a lightweight yet robust appearance, and the rotors are evenly spaced in an 'X' configuration for stable flight. The landing gear consists of short, fixed legs attached to the ends of the arms, providing ground clearance for takeoff and landing. The overall design suggests a modern, consumer-grade drone suitable for aerial photography or recreational use in urban environments. No propeller guards are present, emphasizing portability and agility over maximum safety.
description: A sleek, matte black quadcopter drone with four rotors in an 'X' configuration, fixed landing legs, and a compact, rectangular body. It features a front-mounted camera or sensor and lacks propeller guards.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the camera or sensor at the front, the battery compartment, and all four rotors with fixed landing legs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the central body, the symmetrical rotor arms, and the absence of a visible camera.
description_view_2: Left side view displaying the slim profile of the drone, the side of the battery compartment, and the alignment of the rotors.
description_view_3: Top-down view clearly showing the 'X' rotor configuration, the central body, and the placement of the landing legs.
